name: Mr. Hazim s
subject: Economics
quote: V = f ( k.c ) Where V= value, K= knowledge, C= currency. Knowledge without value is silent gold. Currency without wisdom is hollow wealth when both unite, civilization rise

name: Mr. Abel bulcha
subject: Mathematics
quote: If i can , igreatly remember what i do to day , in ahead of time !

name: Mr. Tesfaye Welela
subject: English
quote: The beautiful thing about learning is that no one can take it away from you,so keep on learning!

name: በላይነህ ዘውዴ
subject: አማርኛ
quote: ቂመኝነት ወይም ነገሮችን በይቅርታ አለመደምሰስ ፤ ልክ እኛው ራሳችን መረዝ ጠጥተን ነገር ግን ጠላታችን አሁን ካሁን ሊሞት ነው እያልን እንደመጠበቅ ያለ ተስፋ ነው።
